settings.text:
Got questions about hair routine, using Nuvé Stamp, or orders?
You’ll find our most common answers here. For anything else, contact us!

settings.q1_1: What is Nuvé Stamp and how does it work?
settings.a1_1: Nuvé Stamp is a microneedling device designed to stimulate hair follicles and promote healthier-looking hair appearance. It uses tiny needles to create micro-channels in the scalp, boosting circulation and enhancing absorption of hair growth serums.
settings.q1_2: Who is Nuvé Stamp designed for?
settings.a1_2: Nuvé Stamp is perfect for anyone experiencing thinning hair, hair thinning, or looking to improve overall scalp health. It's suitable for all hair types and genders.
settings.a2_1: Most users experience minimal discomfort. You may feel a slight tingling or prickling sensation, but it should not be painful. Start with gentle pressure and adjust as needed.
settings.q2_2: How often should I use Nuvé Stamp for best results?
settings.a2_2: For optimal results, use Nuvé Stamp 2-3 times per week. Consistency is key! Allow at least 48 hours between sessions to let your scalp recover.
settings.q2_3: Can I use serums or oils with the device?
settings.a2_3: Yes! In fact, we recommend applying your favorite hair growth serum immediately after using Nuvé Stamp. The micro-channels enhance absorption by up to 300%.
settings.q2_4: Is it safe for color-treated, curly, or sensitive scalps?
settings.a2_4: Absolutely! Nuvé Stamp is safe for all hair types and scalp conditions. If you have a sensitive scalp, start with lighter pressure and gradually increase as your scalp adjusts.
settings.q3_1: How soon will I see visible results?
settings.a3_1: Most users notice improved scalp health within 8–12 weeks. Visible hair growth typically appears after 8-12 weeks of consistent use. Results vary based on individual hair growth cycles.
settings.q3_2: How do I maximize my results?
settings.a3_2: Use Nuvé Stamp consistently 2-3 times per week, pair it with quality hair growth serums, maintain a healthy diet, stay hydrated, and manage stress levels for best results.
settings.q3_3: What if I don't see results?
settings.a3_3: Hair growth takes time and varies by individual. If you don't see results after 12 weeks of consistent use, please contact our support team. We're here to help optimize your routine.
settings.a4_1: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2-3 business days) is available at checkout. International orders may take 10-14 business days.
settings.a4_2: Yes! You'll receive a tracking number via email once your order ships. You can track your package in real-time through our website or the carrier's site.
settings.a4_3: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with your Nuvé Stamp, contact us for a full refund. The device must be in good condition with original packaging.
settings.q5_1: How can I contact customer support?
settings.a5_1: You can reach us via email at support@nuvestamp.com or through our contact form. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
settings.q5_2: What do I do if there's a problem with my device?
settings.a5_2: Contact our support team immediately. We'll troubleshoot the issue and send a replacement if needed. All devices come with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects.
